offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Participate in community forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly dashboard for 1-3 contracts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
